defends: No secrets committed to the repository; .env stays gitignored (baseline §8.1 / credentials-in-files).

patterns.name: jwt
patterns.desc: JSON Web Token (three base64url segments) — Supabase anon/service keys are JWTs

patterns.name: openai-litellm
patterns.desc: OpenAI / LiteLLM style secret key (sk- prefix)

note: Fixed evidence manifest (WORKING_METHOD §1). globs scope to tracked source files; exclude drops node_modules, .git, lockfiles, and the audit package's own fixtures/ so auditing the audit repo never flags its deliberately-bad fixture as a real leak. Real secrets live in .env which is gitignored (not committed) — the content scan targets tracked source, and .env handling is verified by the separate gitignore check.
